headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Hilton Worldwide Holdings, Raises Price Target to $363
summary: Barclays  analyst Brandt Montour   maintains Hilton Worldwide Holdings (NYSE:HLT) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $350 to $363.
